transcriptSkeleton.approach: TDD - wrote 6 comprehensive tests first, then implementation
verificationSteps: Tests written with mocked API responses
All 6 tests pass covering: idle agents, running agents, JSON output, triad readiness, empty state, missing company ID
Manual verification: pnpm paperclipai agent status --help works

output.human: Company info, triad status, per-agent details with idle/running state
output.json: Structured output with companyId, triadReady, triadStatus, agents array
